content: Anthropic Python SDK latest stable is 0.67.0 (Sep 2025). Tool use GA since v0.27.0. Pattern: send tools array in API call, check stop_reason=='tool_use', extract tool_use content block, execute tool, append tool_result content block to messages, loop until stop_reason=='end_turn'. claude-agent-sdk-python is a separate higher-level SDK that handles tool execution autonomously. For PacerAI use the lower-level anthropic package for explicit control over which tools execute and what numbers they return.
